concept: The Architectural Command Center. A highly structured, function-first interface that borrows precision from architectural blueprints. Moving away from generic soft SaaS interfaces to a crisp, high-contrast, professional aesthetic.

dashboard.grid_pattern: Control Room Grid (Dense, rigid F-pattern layout. Utilize all available space horizontally).

surfaces.dashboard_cards: bg-white border border-neutral-200 shadow-sm rounded-sm p-5
surfaces.marketing_cards: bg-white border-2 border-neutral-100 hover:border-neutral-300 transition-colors duration-300 p-8
surfaces.header: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-neutral-200 sticky top-0 z-50

motion.rules: Keep animations fast (<=0.2s) in dashboard for productivity. Use slower, smoother (0.4s-0.6s) animations in the marketing pages.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against background. Functional colors (red/green) must be paired with icons.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

images.description: Black and white modern architectural building, representing structure and enterprise scale. Use with an overlay like bg-white/80 or for a dark section bg-black/60.
Business professionals engaging in a collaborative meeting with charts. Good for 'Features' or 'About Us' section.
Minimalist logo for the social proof/trusted by section.

component_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Inputs should have crisp borders (border-neutral-300), no heavy shadows. Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm) corners.
component_instructions.tables: Crucial for ERP. Use Shadcn Table. Zebra striping or subtle hover states (hover:bg-neutral-50) for rows. Align numbers to the right, use IBM Plex Mono for numeric columns.
component_instructions.buttons: Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00227A]. Secondary: bg-white text-neutral-900 border border-neutral-300 hover:bg-neutral-50.
component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts (via Shadcn charts). Colors should be monochrome variants (neutral-800, neutral-400) + one primary brand color (#002FA7) to highlight the key metric.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype strictly. Do not use purple gradients or overly soft/playful UI elements.
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' (or 'Outfit' as fallback via @fontsource/outfit) for Headings, and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text.
Use the Control Room Grid pattern for the dashboard: highly dense, utilizing horizontal space efficiently, with widgets placed logically.
Ensure the sidebar uses a dark theme (bg-neutral-900) while the main dashboard area is light (bg-[#F5F5F0]) to create a sharp contrast.
Incorporate the provided media URLs specifically for the marketing page. Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image services like via.placeholder.com.
All buttons, inputs, and interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute.
Implement a robust 'Global Search' pattern in the dashboard navbar with a command palette feel (e.g., Cmd+K styling).
